title: Simple Tech of Modrinth
description: It's Suppost to be a simple tech mopack but I don't think it will end up being one.
body:
A modpack with all the tech mods I found/liked(Some tech mods are not here because I didn't like them). Feel free to use this in content creation, just don't try to steal the modpack.
# Notable Mods
- Create
- Ad Astra
- Immersive Aircraft
- Farmer's Delight
- Advanced Netherite
- Tom's Simple Storage Mod
- Supplementries
- Small Ships
- Laser Bridges and Doors
- Traveler's Backpack
- Tectonic
- Biomes o' Pleanty
